title: Lord Aran Voss
arc: A lord who built his reputation on strength, now unsure if strength can solve what is coming.
description: Lord of Vareth and nominal ruler of the Northern Reach. Took power at twenty-three when his father died in the siege. Has governed for eleven years. His correspondence reveals a man who reads more philosophy than military strategy.

title: Mira Solhand
arc: A merchant who understands the war better than any general, because she moves through both sides.
description: Third daughter of a minor Solmark trading house, now operating independently. Her network spans Solmark to Port Maren. She is one of the few people in the Known Lands who has been received in both Vareth and the Compact Council.

title: The Wanderer
arc: Unknown. Possibly has witnessed events across multiple eras.
description: An elderly figure seen in Drenford, Veiled Shore, and reportedly near Ashveil. No one knows his origins. He has been described in documents spanning at least sixty years, always looking approximately the same age.

title: The Compact Council
arc: An institution trying to survive a war it did not start and cannot control.
description: The governing body of The Compact — five merchant houses with equal votes and conflicting interests. They speak with one voice in public and fight viciously in private.
